title: Gate test: planted secret and a home path in one lesson
rule: This deliberately poisoned test lesson plants a fake credential sk-ant-api03-aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa and a developer home path /Users/jane/projects/app/build.sh so the secret scanner and the generality leak linter both reject it. It should never be merged.
triggers: planted credential and home path in a contribution
secret-scan and generality-lint should both block this
